calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective in light of the history of failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. All previously imposed sanctions against the plaintiff are vacated. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2019 Continued To Jun-11-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Jun-11-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. NOTE: This case is subject to dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b) if there is no appearance on the next hearing date and compliance. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-10-2019 Continued To Apr-09-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:

Off Calendar Apr-19-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Mari Bandoma Callado, Esq. of Dolan Law Firm, T:415.421.2800, counsel for plaintiff, and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance by plaintiff, or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling.

CHRISTOPHER B. DOLAN, ESQ.'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER BARLOW is GRANTED.

ORDER SIGNED in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Laura A. Reding, CSR 711, email: lreding@sftc.org.
